TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Ciang

S.FORM: aiza tacini uvaaz a tupaun tu Dahu‘ikit.
aiza tacini ovaaz a topaon tu Daho‘ikit.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩，叫小Dahu。
There is a child called Little Dahu.

S.FORM: a saia hai aizaan tu tasa mas asu tupaun tu Kulu.
S.TRANSL: 他呢，有一隻叫Kulu的狗。
He has a dog called Kulu.

S.FORM: naia hai saipuk mas a sisiuh tu tasa mapingadah sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他們養了一隻青蛙放在瓶子裡面。
They are keeping a frog, which was put inside a bottle.

S.FORM: haitu masa masabah a maz a Dahu‘ikit a hai a maz a isaicia sinaipuk a sisiuh a sisiuh a hai nadadu a kaivakaiva is’aang tu mav ik tu ka pingadahun cin isa naak a ai pasunkavaiz an at.
S.TRANSL: 但是，當那個小Dahu在睡覺，他養的那隻青蛙在著急為何他被鎖在裡面，想知道他的玩伴在哪裡。
When little Dahu is sleeping, the frog he kept is worrying and wondering why he was put inside and where his buddies are.

S.FORM: macisbai a saia tudii maisisia pan cia mun‘apav.
S.TRANSL: 他從瓶子出來逃跑了。
He comes out of the bottle and runs away.

S.FORM: ciang tau ce pian.
S.TRANSL: 講到這邊。
Until here.

S.FORM: ung at kilimun saicia maz a isaicia kucu tu tungnangadah dii hai ka uka.
S.TRANSL: 他找找看牠是不是躲在他的鞋子裡面，可是沒有。
Then he seeks if it is hiding inside his shoes, but it is not.

S.FORM: at maz a sia adii a a Kulu hai ungadahun saicia maz a bungu sia pan saak tu isa maz a sisiuh hai.
S.TRANSL: 那個Kulu把頭放在瓶子裡面，聞聞看青蛙在哪裡。
That Kulu gets his head inside the bottle, smelling and looking for the frog.

S.FORM: uka.
S.TRANSL: 不在。
No.

S.FORM: ung at maz a sia Kulu hai a minasian naia sia siul kilim mas sisiuh cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後Kulu他們從窗戶找青蛙。
Then with Kulu, together they look for the frog from the window.

S.FORM: haitu maz a pan a hai adasu s asu cia madaidaz a isnanastu.
S.TRANSL: 狗帶著瓶子掉到地上。
The dog brings the bottle down to the ground.

S.FORM: panpulaz a pan a.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子破了。
The bottle breaks.

S.FORM: at damuun a maz a adii a Kulu a mas Dahu‘ikit cia kalaun tu nuaz hau tu ka pulazun a pan a.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu把Kulu抓起來，責怪他為什麼把瓶子弄破。
Little Dahu takes Kulu up, blaming it for breaking the bottle.

S.FORM: ung at kunata naia tandusa s isaicia tu a Kulu cia kikilim mas sinaipuk tu sisiuh cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們兩個，和他的Kulu，到外面去繼續找所養的青蛙。
Then the two of them, with his Kulu, go outside and keep on looking for the frog they kept.

S.FORM: lala’laun naicia uka antalam.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直叫他。沒有回音。
They keep calling for him. No answers.

S.FORM: ung at maz a Dahu‘ikit a hai a (CAUGH) kilimun saicia adii a lalaak a tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那個小Dahu，他檢查那個洞看小青蛙是否在裡面。
Then, that Little Dahu, he looks in that hole to check if the little frog went inside it.

S.FORM: at maz a sia Dahu‘ikit a hai a masa kikilim sisiuh sia lalaak cia hai munapav tabukaz a tu dii.
S.TRANSL: 然後當小Dahu在樹洞裡找的時候，一個田鼠出來了。
A vole comes out when that Little Dahu is looking for the frog in that hole.

S.FORM: a maz a sia adii a Dahu‘ikit a hai undazau s sia lukis tu udadaza cia maz a sia sisiuh maicisbai a.
S.TRANSL: 那個小Dahu爬到樹上，看青蛙有沒有逃到樹上。
That Little Dahu climbs on the tree, wondering if the frog ran off onto the tree.

S.FORM: haitu a maz a sia asu a upa izau s saicia maz a a pahusaz a mavuhvuh mahalhal hai panpuszak maz a sia pahusaz hai maciskun amin a masinap mas asu cia na kalat kalat saicia.
S.TRANSL: 狗狗那邊呢，蜂窩被他弄掉了，所有的虎頭蜂散開來追著他咬。
As for the dog, the nest is dropped down by the dog, and all the hornets spread out, chasing and biting the dog.

S.FORM: talidikus saia sia a lukis cia malala’la mas kilimun saicia tu a sisiuh cia.
S.TRANSL: 他扶著樹，一直叫那個他找的青蛙。
He grips the tree, keeping on shouting out for the frog he is looking for.

S.FORM: haitu maz a talidikusan a lukis a hai kaz hangsia ka vaha tu takismuut tu hanvang.
S.TRANSL: 但是他抓的地方原來是野鹿角。
But that place where he is holding the tree, it turns out to be the antlers of a wild deer.

S.FORM: anvahau s saicia maz a sia Dahu‘ikit a tisdadaan mai’aupasia vahlas.
S.TRANSL: 他把小Dahu放在角上，往河跑過去。
He puts Little Dahu on his antlers and runs off toward the river.

S.FORM: ung at taunasian in sia silavahlas hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就到了河邊。
Then they get to the river bank.

S.FORM: halhalu s saicia Dahu‘ikit a ung at maz a luhi a hai kanbiskavan amin saicia.
S.TRANSL: 他丟小Dahu，然後也把小狗踢走了。
He tosses Little Dahu off, and then kicks that small dog off.

S.FORM: a mahalhal lanangadah maz a Dahu‘ikit a mas adii tu Kulu cia sia a vahlas tu danum cia.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu和Kulu掉到河水裡面。
Little Dahu and Kulu drop into the water of the river.

S.FORM: ung at izaun mas Dahu‘ikit cia maz a sia Kulu a ivahlas cia ansahan kusisila.
S.TRANSL: 然後在河裡，小Dahu把Kule抓起來，扛到河邊。
Then, in the water, Little Dahu takes Kulu up and carries it to the riverbank.

S.FORM: ung at isia naia sia taunasian in sia silas lukis cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們到達了河邊的樹。
Then they arrived at the trees by the shore.

S.FORM: a.
S.TRANSL: 啊
Ah

S.FORM: lulunglung kaa tu matahusngi na minsuma pahusaz a ung tu kalat mamita.
S.TRANSL: 小Dahu再一次跟Kulu說：「不要吠，不要吵鬧！不然虎頭蜂會來咬我們。」
Little Dahu tells Kulu again with a gesture: “Don’t bark, don’t be noisy, or the hornets will come and bite us!”

S.FORM: at idadaza naia sia lukis cia tudii islunghu.
S.TRANSL: 他們就在樹上休息。
Then they are resting on the tree.

S.FORM: manaskaldaingaz amin a ung tu isaicia asu a Kulu a.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗，Kulu，也很開心。
His dog, Kulu, is very happy too.

S.FORM: pisaukan naicia maz a sia a.
S.TRANSL: 啊
Ah

S.FORM: mailuskun a sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 他們對著在一起的青蛙行禮。
They take a bow to the frogs being together.

S.FORM: uninang.
S.TRANSL: 感謝。
Thank you!

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.TRANSL: 很高興認識你。
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: na muhna ta maisin in mapasadu.
S.TRANSL: 我們以後再見。
See you later.
